$comment: Size budgets for the built docs site (.vitepress/dist), enforced by documentation/scripts/check-dist-budget.mjs in docs.yml. Baseline 2026-07-20 after the sidebar diet: total 145 MB, api avg 33 KB / p95 47 KB, largest asset llms-full.txt 6.9 MB, largest JS chunk the local-search index at 755 KB (then app 599 KB, mermaid/wardley 598 KB). Budgets carry ~30% headroom; lower them when the site shrinks, never raise them casually - a breach means an SSR/asset amplification regressed (for JS chunks: the search index growing with the API surface, or a new eager dependency landing in the app bundle). NOTE (deep-retest-0.13.11): the Rollup 'some chunks are larger than 500 kB' warning during docs:build is EXPECTED and accepted for the search-index/app/mermaid chunks listed above - this gate's maxJsChunkBytes (1 MB) is the enforced ceiling, so the warning alone is not actionable.
